Arun Kirshna Sasikala Appukuttan: Analytics pro with 20+ years (10+ industry, 10+ research). Expert in R (15+ yrs - all time top R contributor in Stackoverflow), Python (5), SQL (5), Java (2+). Holds a Ph.D. in Quantitative Genetics. Passionate about tech, data, and cutting-edge analytics. Proven track record, dynamic and innovative approach.
